title: Transit Point @ Margaret Drive (TP@MD)
text:
Transit Point @ Margaret Drive (TP@MD) - SupportGoWhere
Transit Point @ Margaret Drive (TP@MD)
Share link
Provides short term accommodation and social work intervention to rough sleeping individuals, with 24/7 admission.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based
Fees payable
Referral required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

Transit Point @ Margaret Drive (TP@MD) is an interim shelter with 24/7 admission, which aims to: 

a) provide immediate safe accommodation for rough sleepers; and 

b) enable rough sleepers to achieve long-term stable housing and equip them for independent living.

Who is this for?

TP@MD admits rough sleepers who meet the following criteria:  

a) Be a Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident 

b) Aged 18 years and above 

c) Self-declared to be free from serious infectious diseases that may be easily transmitted in a communal setting 

d) Self-declared to not be suffering from serious psychotic disorders, and/or serious behavioural problems, and/or serious medical conditions that require him/her to be under close individual supervision or require nursing care 

e) Self-declared to be non-active substance or alcohol abusers

What to expect?

Persons who are homeless/sleeping rough are first housed in the Holding Area where their immediate basic needs can be taken care of, followed by an assessment of their suitability for the Stay-in Shelter programme. The Stay-in Shelter Programme will provide social work intervention to address their longer-term needs.

How to apply?

You may contact your nearest Family Service Centre (FSC) or Social Service Office (SSO) for a referral. To find the FSC/SSO in your neighbourhood, call Comcare hotline at 1800 222 0000 or visit https://www.msf.gov.sg/our-services/directories

Information last updated on 29 Sep 2025
